records.ety: [L. praesentatio a showing, representation: cf. F. prsentation.]

defs: The act of presenting, or the state of being presented; a setting forth; an offering; bestowal.
quotes: Prayers are sometimes a presentation of mere desires.

defs: exhibition; representation; display; appearance; semblance; show.
quotes: Under the presentation of the shoots his wit.

defs: That which is presented or given; a present; a gift, as, the picture was a presentation.
The act of offering a clergyman to the bishop or ordinary for institution in a benefice; the right of presenting a clergyman.
quotes: If the bishop admits the patron's presentation, the clerk so admitted is next to be instituted by him.

defs: The particular position of the child during labor relatively to the passage though which it is to be brought forth; -- specifically designated by the part which first appears at the mouth of the uterus; as, a breech presentation.
